extension.summary: Kodi Debrid Media Manager playback bridge
extension.description: Receives movie and episode play requests from TMDb Bingie Helper, queries Debrid Media Manager, resolves cached Real-Debrid and/or AllDebrid streams, and passes direct playback URLs to Kodi. Includes quality sorting, AV1 filtering/probing, stream retry, stream and TV pack caching, local resume progress, IntroDB-backed skip buttons, and next-episode overlays.
